  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>

  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.11.1" />

data.content:
This is an NUnit project on VSTest. Use the `--filter` option with `FullyQualifiedName`:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests"
```

The `~` operator means "contains", so this matches all tests in the `ReportExporterTests` class while excluding `ReportGeneratorTests`.
